message:
feat(signal): add SIGPIPE and SIGALRM support to the signal dispatcher

Extend the Unix signal dispatcher with two new signal kinds:
SignalKind::Pipe (SIGPIPE) and SignalKind::Alarm (SIGALRM).

Add public convenience functions sigpipe() and sigalrm() that create
signal streams for these signals. Grow all_signal_kinds() from 8 to 10
entries. Extend signal_kind_from_raw to map libc::SIGPIPE and
libc::SIGALRM.

SIGPIPE is important for network services that need to detect broken
pipes without crashing. SIGALRM enables timer-based watchdog patterns.

Add tests for the new helpers and raw signal mapping. Fix typo in docs:
"faned out" -> "fanned out".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
